channel.title: vfio on Pälzer
channel.description: Recent content in vfio on Pälzer

item.title: Slow VFIO guest startup
item.description: Slow guest startup caused by using VFIO a.k.a being lost without a map(ing) Disclaimer: for now this is about the debugging where the time sink is, it mentions ways to mitigate some effects but not a fix. If later a fix comes up I’ll update. Symptom: classic linear scaling at work Starting a KVM guest usually is in the range of a few seconds. Obviously the guest then needs time to boot up, but the preparation phase is rather short.
